name: liquid-button
title: Liquid Button
description: A button featuring an organic gooey liquid-puddle hover morph effect using SVG Gaussian blur filters.
docs:
Install with your package manager:

npm: npx shadcn@latest add https://design.piyusharyan.online/r/liquid-button.json
pnpm: pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://design.piyusharyan.online/r/liquid-button.json
yarn: yarn dlx shadcn@latest add https://design.piyusharyan.online/r/liquid-button.json
bun: bunx shadcn@latest add https://design.piyusharyan.online/r/liquid-button.json
